doi_match_title: Experience in Bachelor's Practice Organization at Bauman MSTU
finding: Dolma contamination comes through two routes: (1) web component carries Sputnik/TASS propaganda directly (4 reunification docs, 111 Republic of Crimea docs), (2) academic component (peS2o) carries 2 Russia-framing papers including 1 exact DOI match with our confirmed set. Web route is the larger vector.
note: This is the full Dolma v1.6 8B sample (103 shards, 13M docs). The full Dolma corpus is ~3T tokens and not publicly downloadable.
